summary: Summary: The encounter begins with Speaker2, frustrated after an hour in line, showing anger and demanding that Speaker1 take their application. Speaker1 is neutral at first, questioning the demand, then becomes frustrated when trying to correct errors on the form. As Speaker1 points out mistakes, Speaker2 grows more angry—expressing frustration and anger when faced with a new form—and the conflict escalates. The disagreement intensifies into mutual anger and frustration, with Speaker1 shifting from neutral to anger and surprise at Speaker2’s outburst; Speaker1 calls security and tells Speaker2 to leave, and both end the interaction angry and frustrated.
